creator: simon@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 2007.01.19 00:42:00 +0200, Imri Zvik wrote:
> Hi,
> 
> A very similar panic happened to me 3 times in the last 24 hours:
> 
[...]

> It happened to me on 6.2-PRERELEASE, and then I've upgraded to 6.2
> RELEASE:
> 
> FreeBSD cemetery 6.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE #4: Thu Jan 18 00:01:29
> IST 2007     root@cemetery:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/IGLD  i386
> 
> Is it possible to get the patch mentioned in PR? I will gladly apply it
> and test it (the panic happened on a very busy mail server, running
> postfix) here.

The patch has been MFC'ed to RELENG_6 so you can either find the
particular commit by jhb and generate a patch yourself or just use
RELENG_6.  The commit to head mentioned mx1 in the commit log, AFAIR
the MFC didn't.

I think it's likely there will be an errata notice which merges this
to RELENG_6_2, but it's up to re@ and if it's going to happen it will
probably be a couple of weeks at least before this happens.

-- 
Simon L. Nielsen
